title: Shells Town Under Morgan’s Fear
description: On pages 1–4, this part resolves the Shells Town conflict and separates Coby’s Marine dream from Luffy and Zoro’s pirate path.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Any of you still want to capture us!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Morgan's reign of Terror is over!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THEY'RE HAPPY WE DEFEATED THEIR CAPTAIN.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: NOT EATING FOR NINE DAYS WAS WORSE THAN I THOUGHT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: See, you'd never have survived the whole month!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: FUNNY... YOU SEEM EVEN HUNGER THAN ME!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's kind of you to feed me along with the heroes, MA'AM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: IT'S THE LEAST I CAN DO! YOU THREE SAVED THE WHOLE TOWN!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And I'm going to become a lot greater!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're headed for the Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THERE ARE ONLY TWO OF YOU! IF YOU GO THERE, YOU'LL JUST BE SAILING TO YOUR DEATHS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THE MOST BLOODTHIRSTY PIRATES IN THE WORLD ARE THERE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: "Well, I guess if we're after the "ONEPIENCE"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...THE GRAND LINE IS WHERE WE HAVE TO GO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHAT'S IT TO YOU? YOU'RE NOT COMING WITH US.

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
